text:
There once was a cat that couldn't stop sneezing. Every single time something shiny caught her eye she'd burst into sneezes. She even made little sneezing sounds all day long. At night she'd go into her toy box and sneezed some more, imagining fancy things. She had a stuffed unicorn she liked to snuggle. She would sometimes dream it sneezed rainbows.

The unicorn was special. It had the most vibrant coat of rainbow stripes. One day while she was snuggling her dreamy unicorn, a sneezing fit came upon her. The unicorn sneezed rainbows. Everyone heard them. All over the moon. Even the stars sneezed.

The cats all laughed. They had a little contest. Who could make the longest rainbow? But they all sneezed their hardest, hearts racing, and it was nothing. They couldn't make anything.

That night the unicorn decided it couldn't sleep. It sneezed glitter dust
